steps: In a large pot, saute whole garlic and rosemary in EVOO.
Add the chickpeas and saute to coat, then remove garlic and rosemary sprigs.
Stir in tomato pasta and water, and simmer for 20 minutes.
Take out ¾ of the chickpeas and blend them until smooth then pour the goop back into the pot.
Add the pasta to the pot, season with salt and a little extra water if too thick.
Cook pasta according to packet directions.

notes: If you want, you can throw in seasonings or onions to saute with garlic and rosemary. Don't remove them with the garlic and rosemary!

recipe_info.title: Simple chickpea pasta
recipe_info.intro: This recipe can be very modular, so experiment with other flavours or ingredients! This was copied from a YouTube video description, so it's not as detailes as watching the video itself.
